notes: Iter 5 COMPLETE: score=49 (19/26 fields + 3 pages) — new best. Pages 1-3 passed cleanly. SetSpinbuttonTool confirmed working (both spinbuttons set to 9 in ONE LLM turn). Stalled at page 4 graduation date: 'May 2016' not ISO format -> _select_calendar_date couldn't navigate -> 'Please choose a valid date' loop. Also: salary/LinkedIn never filled (agent jumped spinbuttons->skills), phone missing +1 prefix, Blazor wrongly clicked, DDD missed. ITER-6 FIXES in task_iter4.txt: (1) graduation date ISO '2016-05-01', (2) salary/LinkedIn explicit ordering before skills, (3) phone +1 must-include note, (4) Blazor warning + DDD explicit, (5) per-turn limit 12 note for skills.

ground_truth.tool_schema_format: bare {name,description,parameters} for hand-crafted <tools>; ENVELOPED {type:function,function:{...}} for Ollama native tools: API field
ground_truth.tool_result_role: role:tool works via Ollama native API (Ollama handles it internally)
ground_truth.vibethinker_model: WeiboAI/VibeThinker-1.5B; as an ADVISOR it has NO page snapshot so it hallucinates refs -> DISABLED
ground_truth.qwen3_behavior: qwen3:4b on Ollama returns STRUCTURED message.tool_calls (qwen2.5-coder returned null+text). Thinking routes to message.thinking; content is clean. HermesCodec is zero-changes compatible.
ground_truth.form_widgets: job form: 12 custom <button role=combobox> dropdowns (use select_option, NOT fill); a custom calendar DatePicker (navigate year/month then click ISO-labeled day cell); MultiSelect skills; NumberStepper (spinbutton, click +N times); Checkbox certify; SignaturePad; FileUpload; ~26 fields across 8 pages
ground_truth.advisor_decision: DISABLED. Run command must NOT pass --advisor.
ground_truth.context_window: num_ctx=32768 required (OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 makes it safe at ~4500 MiB). 16384 gives only 7168 token input budget -- too small for 8-page form. Restore to 32768.
ground_truth.scoring_system: GET http://localhost:3000/api/score/session-end at end of each run. Writes .vibe/last_benchmark_score.json with commitMessageStart.
ground_truth.loop_issue: Full loop architecture documented in GitHub issue #142 on VibeHarness repo.
ground_truth.iter5_fixes: NEW SetSpinbuttonTool (set_spinbutton(target,value)): reads the spinbutton current value, finds Increase/Decrease sibling, clicks |delta| times in Python -> ONE LLM roundtrip. Registered in _WEB_TOOL_CLASSES. task_iter4.txt spinbutton instructions rewritten.
ground_truth.iter6_fixes: task_iter4.txt: (1) graduation date ISO '2016-05-01' (not 'May 2016'); (2) explicit ordering instruction for page 3 (salary+LinkedIn BEFORE skills); (3) phone +1 must-include note; (4) Blazor warning + skills 'ONLY these labels'; (5) per-turn limit 12 note, split skills across 2 turns.
ground_truth.calendar_behavior: _select_calendar_date only handles ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. 'May 2016' is NOT recognized -> calendar opens but does NOT navigate. Use ISO dates for all date pickers.
ground_truth.score_breakdown: iter-5: phone missing +1 (-1), graduation date missing (-1), salary missing (-1), resume missing (-1), whyInterested missing (-1), signatureName missing (-1), certifyTrue missing (-1) = 7 fields wrong. Pages 4-8 not advanced = -50 pts. No submit = -20.
